Node.help: Implicit base class for all objects driven through the x-protocol infrastructure.

Enum.name: eSerializationDepth
Enum.help: Serialization options: Shallow returns just the basic members, but not lists. Node returns members including lists. Deep returns all data under a node. Prefetch returns member nodes and list of nodes as ids.

Method2.name: _GetXml
Method2.help: Get xml representation of the object

Argument.name: forPersistentStorage
Argument.help: Flag indicating if the xml is going to be used as persistent storage. If set, it removes ephemeral information such as IORs.

Argument.name: xml
Argument.help: The xml representation of the object

Method2.name: _SetXml
Method2.help: Deserialize xml representation of object into object

Argument.name: xml
Argument.help: The xml representation of the object

Argument.name: merge
Argument.help: Whether to clean the object prior to serialization or merge data

Method2.name: _ImportXml
Method2.help: Deserialize xml representation of object into object and deal with backward compatibility issues.

Argument.name: xml
Argument.help: The xml representation of the object

Argument.name: merge
Argument.help: Whether to clean the object prior to serialization or merge data

Method2.name: _Disposed
Method2.help: Client API must calls this method to indicate object is not used by client any more

Method2.name: _GetObjectListXml
Method2.help: Get xml representation of a list of objects

Argument.name: forPersistentStorage
Argument.help: Flag indicating if the xml is going to be used as persistent storage. If set, it removes ephemeral information such as IORs.

Argument.name: xml
Argument.help: The xml representation of the object list

Method2.name: _SetObjectListXml
Method2.help: Set a list of objects using its xml representation

Argument.name: xml
Argument.help: The xml representation of the object list

Argument.name: merge
Argument.help: Whether to clean the object prior to serialization or merge data

Method2.name: _GetManagedDataXml
Method2.help: Get xml representation of the object. Wrapper for _GetXml.

Argument.name: isDeep
Argument.help: Whether the depth is kDeed or kPrefetch

Argument.name: xml
Argument.help: The xml representation of the object

Method2.name: _SetManagedDataXml
Method2.help: Set object data using xml representation of the object. Wrapper for _SetXml.

Argument.name: xml
Argument.help: The xml representation of the object

Method2.name: _GetInstantiationXml
Method2.help: Get xml representation of a freshly created instance of a particular type (internal use only)

Argument.name: xml
Argument.help: The xml representation of the object

Method2.name: _AppendListMember
Method2.help: Append new object to object list (internal use only)

Argument.name: objecType
Argument.help: The type of the object being added

Argument.name: clientObjectId
Argument.help: The client side assigned object id of the new object

Argument.name: xml
Argument.help: The xml representation of the object

Method2.name: _DeleteListMember
Method2.help: Delete object from object list (internal use only)

Argument.name: id
Argument.help: The id of the object being deleted

Method2.name: _PrefetchListMembers
Method2.help: Get xml representation of list contents (internal use only)

Argument.name: idList
Argument.help: List of ids of objects to be retrieved

Argument.name: xmlList
Argument.help: Xml representation of the objects being retrieved.

Struct.name: ClassVersion
Struct.help: Structure representing a class (internal use only)

Member.name: version
Member.help: The version code of the class

Member.name: serverInstantiate
Member.help: Whether this class must he instantiated on the server

List.name: ClassVersionList
List.help: List of class information structures (internal use only)

Method2.name: _GetClassVersionList
Method2.help: Get list of class information structures (internal use only)

Method2.name: _GetNewObjectIdRange
Method2.help: Reserve range of ids for client side instantiation (internal use only)

Argument.name: count
Argument.help: The number of ids in the range

Method2.name: _GetCorbaIor
Method2.help: Get CORBA IOR for this object (internal use only)

Argument.name: ior
Argument.help: String form of the IOR for this object

Method2.name: _Validate
Method2.help: Validate this object (internal use only)

Method2.name: _CreateFileTransferContext
Method2.help: Create context for sending file to server (internal use only)

Argument.name: id
Argument.help: The ID of the transfer context

Method2.name: _WriteFileBlock
Method2.help: Write to transfer file (internal use only)

Argument.name: id
Argument.help: The ID of the transfer context

Method2.name: _ReadFileBlock
Method2.help: Read from transfer file (internal use only)

Argument.name: id
Argument.help: The ID of the transfer context

Argument.name: maxBytes
Argument.help: Maximum number of bytes to read

Method2.name: _CloseFileTransferContext
Method2.help: Close file transfer context (internal use only)

Argument.name: id
Argument.help: The ID of the transfer context

Method2.name: _WriteLock
Method2.help: locks object for modification

Method2.name: _GetThisId
Method2.help: Get ID of this object (internal use only)

Method2.name: _GetPropertyObjectId
Method2.help: Get ID of child object (internal use only)

Argument.name: name
Argument.help: The name of the child object

Method2.name: _GetPropertyObjectIdAndType
Method2.help: Get ID and type of child object (internal use only)

Argument.name: name
Argument.help: The name of the child object

Method2.name: _PropertyNodeInstantiate
Method2.help: Instantiate child object (internal use only)

Argument.name: name
Argument.help: The name of the child object

Argument.name: type
Argument.help: The type of the new object

Argument.name: id
Argument.help: The id of the child object

Method2.name: _PropertyNodeBind
Method2.help: Bind child object (internal use only)

Argument.name: name
Argument.help: The name of the child object

Argument.name: id
Argument.help: The id of the src object being bound to _name_

Argument.name: type
Argument.help: The type of the newly bound object

Method2.name: _PropertyNodeCharacterizationData
Method2.help: Get type and ID of a child object (internal use only)

Argument.name: name
Argument.help: The name of the child object

Argument.name: type
Argument.help: The type of the new object

Argument.name: id
Argument.help: The id of the child object

Method2.name: _PropertyNodeListEmpty
Method2.help: Clear node list (internal use only)

Argument.name: name
Argument.help: The name of the node list

Method2.name: _PropertyNodeListSize
Method2.help: Get size of node list (internal use only)

Argument.name: name
Argument.help: The name of the node list

Argument.name: size
Argument.help: The size of the node list

Method2.name: _PropertyNodeListDelete
Method2.help: Delete entry in node list (internal use only)

Argument.name: name
Argument.help: The name of the node list

Argument.name: index
Argument.help: Index of entry to be deleted

Method2.name: _PropertyNodeListPopHead
Method2.help: Delete first entry in node list (internal use only)

Argument.name: name
Argument.help: The name of the node list

Method2.name: _PropertyNodeListPopTail
Method2.help: Delete last entry in node list (internal use only)

Argument.name: name
Argument.help: The name of the node list

Method2.name: _PropertyNodeListAddHead
Method2.help: Add entry in node list in first position (internal use only)

Argument.name: name
Argument.help: The name of the node list

Argument.name: type
Argument.help: The type of object to add

Method2.name: _PropertyNodeListAddTail
Method2.help: Add entry in node list in last position (internal use only)

Argument.name: name
Argument.help: The name of the node list

Argument.name: type
Argument.help: The type of object to add

Method2.name: _PropertyNodeListGet
Method2.help: Get type and ID for node list entry (internal use only)

Argument.name: name
Argument.help: The name of the node list

Method2.name: _PropertyIntSet
Method2.help: Set value of int property (internal use only)

Argument.name: value
Argument.help: The value to set the property to

Method2.name: _PropertyIntGet
Method2.help: Get value of int property (internal use only)

Method2.name: _PropertyDoubleSet
Method2.help: Set value of int property (internal use only)

Argument.name: value
Argument.help: The value to set the property to

Method2.name: _PropertyDoubleGet
Method2.help: Get value of double property (internal use only)

Method2.name: _PropertyStringSet
Method2.help: Set value of string property (internal use only)

Argument.name: value
Argument.help: The value to set the property to

Method2.name: _PropertyStringGet
Method2.help: Get value of string property (internal use only)

Method2.name: _PropertyBooleanSet
Method2.help: Set value of bool property (internal use only)

Argument.name: value
Argument.help: The value to set the property to

Method2.name: _PropertyBooleanGet
Method2.help: Get value of bool property (internal use only)

Method2.name: _PropertyIntListEmpty
Method2.help: Clear int list (internal use only)

Method2.name: _PropertyIntListSize
Method2.help: Get size of int list (internal use only)

Method2.name: _PropertyIntListGet
Method2.help: Get entry in int list (internal use only)

Argument.name: index
Argument.help: The index of the entry to get

Method2.name: _PropertyIntListSet
Method2.help: Set entry in int list (internal use only)

Argument.name: index
Argument.help: The index of the entry to set

Argument.name: value
Argument.help: The new value of the entry

Method2.name: _PropertyIntListDelete
Method2.help: Delete entry in int list (internal use only)

Argument.name: index
Argument.help: The index of the entry to delete

Method2.name: _PropertyIntListAddHead
Method2.help: Add entry at head of int list (internal use only)

Method2.name: _PropertyIntListAddTail
Method2.help: Add entry at tail of int list (internal use only)

Method2.name: _PropertyIntListPopHead
Method2.help: Remove entry from head of int list (internal use only)

Method2.name: _PropertyIntListPopTail
Method2.help: Remove entry from tail of int list (internal use only)

Method2.name: _PropertyDoubleListEmpty
Method2.help: Clear double list (internal use only)

Method2.name: _PropertyDoubleListSize
Method2.help: Get size of double list (internal use only)

Method2.name: _PropertyDoubleListGet
Method2.help: Get entry in double list (internal use only)

Argument.name: index
Argument.help: The index of the entry to get

Method2.name: _PropertyDoubleListSet
Method2.help: Set entry in double list (internal use only)

Argument.name: index
Argument.help: The index of the entry to set

Argument.name: value
Argument.help: The new value of the entry

Method2.name: _PropertyDoubleListDelete
Method2.help: Delete entry in double list (internal use only)

Argument.name: index
Argument.help: The index of the entry to delete

Method2.name: _PropertyDoubleListAddHead
Method2.help: Add entry at head of double list (internal use only)

Method2.name: _PropertyDoubleListAddTail
Method2.help: Add entry at head of double list (internal use only)

Method2.name: _PropertyDoubleListPopHead
Method2.help: Remove entry from head of double list (internal use only)

Method2.name: _PropertyDoubleListPopTail
Method2.help: Remove entry from tail of double list (internal use only)

Method2.name: _PropertyStringListEmpty
Method2.help: Clear string list (internal use only)

Method2.name: _PropertyStringListSize
Method2.help: Get size of string list (internal use only)

Method2.name: _PropertyStringListGet
Method2.help: Get entry in string list (internal use only)

Argument.name: index
Argument.help: The index of the entry to get

Method2.name: _PropertyStringListSet
Method2.help: Set entry in string list (internal use only)

Argument.name: index
Argument.help: The index of the entry to set

Argument.name: value
Argument.help: The new value of the entry

Method2.name: _PropertyStringListDelete
Method2.help: Delete entry in string list (internal use only)

Argument.name: index
Argument.help: The index of the entry to delete

Method2.name: _PropertyStringListAddHead
Method2.help: Add entry at head of string list (internal use only)

Method2.name: _PropertyStringListAddTail
Method2.help: Add entry at tail of string list (internal use only)

Method2.name: _PropertyStringListPopHead
Method2.help: Remove entry from head of string list (internal use only)

Method2.name: _PropertyStringListPopTail
Method2.help: Remove entry from tail of string list (internal use only)
